name: Marquee
description: An infinite scrolling marquee component that smoothly loops content horizontally or vertically, perfect for testimonials, logos, or any repeating content.
whenToUse: Use for client logos, testimonial carousels, partner lists, or any content that should scroll continuously in a loop.

props.name: children
props.description: Content items to scroll in the marquee

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Pause the animation on mouse hover

props.name: repeat
props.description: Number of content repetitions for seamless loop

codeExample:
import { Marquee } from "@/components/ui/marquee" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" const reviews = [ { name: "Jack", body: "This is amazing!", img: "/avatar1.png" }, { name: "Jill", body: "I love this so much!", img: "/avatar2.png" }, { name: "John", body: "Incredible work!", img: "/avatar3.png" }, ] export function MarqueeDemo() { return (
{reviews.map((review) => ( ))}
) }
